meta.purpose: Small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-event current rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

primarySourcesChecked: data/database.json roster skeleton on main for Lot 66-70
Open PR search for active Numata athlete research work
HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press D/E result PDF locator from adjacent prior batch logs
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF locator from prior batch logs
Web exact-name searches scoped to HPA/high-trust result terms
batchScope.openPrCheck: One open PR (#111) was present, but it is a standalone completion report generator and does not edit athlete data, candidates, or the A4 print layout. No overlapping open athlete research PR for Lot 66-70 was found.
batchScope.writeScope: Research log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.

sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Locator reused from adjacent Lot 71-75 prior batch log. Row-level extraction for Lot 66-70 was not completed in this run, so no current-event result rows are asserted.

sourceIndex.title: Exact-name web searches for Lot 66-70 athlete histories
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Exact-name searches for HPA/powerlifting/bench press terms and JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF-oriented terms returned no promotable official or high-trust history for the five athletes in this run.

athletes.searchNotes: Roster skeleton confirmed Lot 66 identity. External exact-name web searches did not return a promotable official/high-trust domestic Hokkaido, national, international/world, three-lift powerlifting, or single bench press history.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: No prior domestic Hokkaido, national, international/world, three-lift powerlifting, or single bench press histories were confirmed from official/high-trust sources for Lot 66-70 in this run. Current-event Numata rows were not asserted without row-level extraction.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Perform row-level extraction of the HPA 2026 Numata D/E速報 PDF before adding current-event result rows, then separately revisit duplicate-name handling for 矢崎 光康 Lot 70 and Lot 98.
